name: Skeleton Patrol
description: Ancient undead guards patrol the ruins, their bones rattling with each step!

dungeon_l1_encounter_1_complete.display_message: The skeletal guards collapse into piles of bones. The passage ahead is clear.

ambient_description: Ancient skeletal warriors stand guard in the dusty chamber. Their hollow eye sockets glow with pale blue light as they detect your presence.
victory_description: The skeletons collapse into heaps of bone and rust. The ancient guardians have been put to rest once more.
defeat_description: You retreat from the chamber, the skeletal warriors' hollow laughter echoing behind you.
